name: 呼吸作用
subject: biology
domain_name: 呼吸与协调 / Respiration & Coordination / Respiration & Coordination
curriculum_points: 3 Describe the functions of the following components of blood: (a) red blood cells in transporting oxygen, including the role of haemoglobin (b) white blood cells in phagocytosis and antibody production (c) platelets in clotting (details are not required) (d) plasma in the transport of blood cells, ions, nutrients, urea, hormones and carbon dioxide
4 State the roles of blood clotting as preventing blood loss and the entry of pathogens
7 Describe the process of clotting as the conversion of fibrinogen to fibrin to form a mesh
